title: Catified Cursor
description: Completely impractical resource pack that adds a cat to the cursor
body:
# Catified Cursor
![A series of cat cursors, on a blue background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/syYLOOdu/images/bc75c353913b03de8f0880e7c252fd635a1fb3f9.png)

**Requires the [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) mod to work!**

Resource pack for cat cursors, impractical for gameplay but in exchange there is cat. Feel free to recolor or edit for your own cat cursor

all cursor sprites are set to 2x scale by default but is changeable through mod settings or the file!
